APIResponse.name: APIResponse
APIResponse.description: The API response is always a JSON object using utf8 encoding.

properties.name: success
properties.description: indicates if the request was successful

properties.name: error_code
properties.description: In case of request error, this error_code provides information about the error.

properties.name: msg
properties.description: In cas of error, provides a French error message relative to the error

WebSocketRequest.name: WebSocketRequest
WebSocketRequest.description: The requests use the following format:

properties.name: request_id
properties.description: if you specifiy a request_id in your request, it will be added in the corresponding reply, so that you can correlate responses to the request

WebSocketResponse.name: WebSocketResponse
WebSocketResponse.description: Responses to such requests will have the following format:

properties.name: request_id
properties.description: if you set a request_id in your WebSocketRequest, the same request_id will be returned in the associated response

properties.name: action
properties.description: the action specified in the associated WebSocketRequest

properties.name: success
properties.description: indicates if the request was successful

properties.name: error_code
properties.description: In case of request error, this error_code provides information about the error.

properties.name: msg
properties.description: In cas of error, provides a French error message relative to the error

WebSocketNotification.name: WebSocketNotification
WebSocketNotification.description: When the Freebox wants to send a notification on WebSocket it will have the following format:

properties.name: action
properties.description: The action will have the value ‘notification’

properties.name: source
properties.description: The name of the source of the notification

properties.name: event
properties.description: The name of event that generated the notification

properties.name: result
properties.description: the content of the notification (may be omitted if no data has to be transferred along with the notification)

AirMediaConfig.name: AirMediaConfig
AirMediaConfig.description: AirMedia config has the following attributes:

properties.name: password
properties.description: If not empty, the client will have to enter a password to be able to use this airmedia server

AirMediaReceiver.name: AirMediaReceiver
AirMediaReceiver.description: AirMedia receivers have the following attributes

properties.name: password_protected
properties.description: Is set to true the receiver is protected by a password

properties.name: capabilities
properties.description: List of receiver capabilities from the following list

CallEntry.name: CallEntry
CallEntry.description: Call entries have the following properties

properties.name: number
properties.description: Callee number for outgoing calls. Caller number for incoming calls.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Callee name for outgoing calls. Caller name for incoming calls.

properties.name: new
properties.description: Call entry as not been acknowledged yet.

properties.name: contact_id
properties.description: If the number matches an entry in the contact database, the id of the matching contact.

enum.description: connection is about to become inactive

properties.name: bytes_up
properties.description: total uploaded bytes since last connection

properties.name: bytes_down
properties.description: total downloaded bytes since last connection

properties.name: ipv4_port_range
properties.description: Some customers share the same IPv4 and each customer is then assigned a port range. The first value is the first port of the assigned range and the second value is the last port (inclusive).

properties.name: ping
properties.description: should the Freebox respond to external ping requests

properties.name: is_secure_pass
properties.description: is the admin password secure enough to enable remote access

properties.name: remote_access_port
properties.description: port number to use for remote HTTP access

properties.name: remote_access_min_port
properties.description: This field indicate the minimum possible value for remote_access_port (see ConnectionStatus ipv4_port_range)

properties.name: remote_access_max_port
properties.description: This field indicate the maximum possible value for remote_access_port (see ConnectionStatus ipv4_port_range)

properties.name: remote_access_ip
properties.description: IPv4 to use for remote access (can be missing if connection is down)

properties.name: api_remote_access
properties.description: is remote access enabled for apps, or share link

properties.name: adblock_not_set
properties.description: if set to true adblock setting has never been set by the user

properties.name: allow_token_request
properties.description: if false, user has disabled new token request. New apps can’t request a new token. Apps that already have a token are still allowed

properties.name: next_hop
properties.description: the next hop for the prefix

properties.name: rxmt
properties.description: only available when phyr is on

properties.name: rxmt_corr
properties.description: only available when phyr is on

properties.name: rxmt_uncorr
properties.description: only available when phyr is on

properties.name: rtx_tx
properties.description: only available when ginp is on

properties.name: rtx_c
properties.description: only available when ginp is on

properties.name: rtx_uc
properties.description: only available when ginp is on

properties.name: hostname
properties.description: dns name to use to register

ContactEntry.name: ContactEntry
ContactEntry.description: Contact entries have the following properties

ContactNumber.name: ContactNumber
ContactNumber.description: Contact number have the following properties

properties.name: is_default
properties.description: is this number the preferred contact phone number

properties.name: is_own
properties.description: is this number the Freebox owner number

ContactAddress.name: ContactAddress
ContactAddress.description: Contact address have the following properties

ContactUrl.name: ContactUrl
ContactUrl.description: Contact URL have the following properties

ContactEmail.name: ContactEmail
ContactEmail.description: Contact email have the following properties

DhcpConfig.name: DhcpConfig
DhcpConfig.description: DHCP config has the following attributes:

properties.name: sticky_assign
properties.description: Always assign the same IP to a given host

properties.name: dns
properties.description: List of dns servers to include in DHCP reply

properties.name: ip
properties.description: IPv4 to assign to the host

properties.name: host
properties.description: LAN host information from LAN browser (refer to LanHost documentation)

properties.name: lease_remaining
properties.description: time left before lease needs to be refreshed

properties.name: assign_time
properties.description: timestamp of the lease first assignment

properties.name: refresh_time
properties.description: timestamp of the last lease refresh

properties.name: host
properties.description: LAN host information from LAN browser (refer to LanHost documentation)

Download.name: Download
Download.description: Download objects have the following attributes:

enum.description: task is stopped, can be resumed by setting the status to downloading
task will start when a new download slot is available the queue position is stored in queue_pos attribute
task is preparing to start download
there was a problem with the download, you can get an error code in the error field
the download is over. For bt you can resume seeding setting the status to seeding if the ratio is not reached yet
(only valid for nzb) download is over, the downloaded files are being checked using par2
(only valid for nzb) download is over, the downloaded files are being repaired using par2
only valid for nzb) download is over, the downloaded files are being extracted
(only valid for bt) download is over, the content is Change to being shared to other users. The task will automatically stop once the seed ratio has been reached
You can set a task status to ‘retry’ to restart the download task.

properties.name: queue_pos
properties.description: position in download queue (0 if not queued)

properties.name: created_ts
properties.description: timestamp of the download creation time

properties.name: download_dir
properties.description: directory where the file(s) will be saved (base64 encoded)

properties.name: stop_ratio
properties.description: Only relevant for bittorrent tasks. Once the transmit ration has been reached the task will stop seeding.

properties.name: archive_password
properties.description: ( only relevant for nzb ) password for extracting downloaded archives

properties.name: info_hash
properties.description: ( only relevant for bt ) torrent info_hash encoded in hexa

properties.name: piece_length
properties.description: ( only relevant for bt ) torrent piece length in bytes

enum.description: config has not been checked yet
unable to connect to NNTP server

properties.name: enabled_ipv6
properties.description: is the dht enabled on IPv6

properties.name: node_count_ipv6
properties.description: number of active nodes on IPv6

properties.name: nb_tasks_active
properties.description: number of active tasks (checking + queued + extracting + repairing + seeding + downloading)

properties.name: rx_rate
properties.description: current receive rate in bytes / second

properties.name: tx_rate
properties.description: current transmit rate in bytes / second

properties.name: throttling_is_scheduled
properties.description: if true, the current throttling mode has been computed using the throttling schedule

DownloadFile.name: DownloadFile
DownloadFile.description: Each Download has one or more DownloadFile .

properties.name: filepath
properties.description: full filepath on the disk (encoded as in file system api)

enum.description: there was a problem with this file, see error to get the error code

properties.name: error
properties.description: file error code in case status is error

enum.description: this file will not be downloaded

properties.name: preview_url
properties.description: url to preview downloaded file (only available for bittorrent) as a share link, this url can be use without requiring any form of authentication so that it can be passed as-is to any software.

DownloadTracker.name: DownloadTracker
DownloadTracker.description: Each tracker is identified by its announce URL.

properties.name: is_backup
properties.description: true if the tracker is a backup tracker (the downloader won’t connect to this tracker unless the primary tracker fails)

enum.description: an error occurred while trying to announce

properties.name: interval
properties.description: desired interval between two announces (in seconds)

properties.name: min_interval
properties.description: minimum interval between two announces (in seconds)

properties.name: nseeders
properties.description: number of seeders announced on tracker

properties.name: nleechers
properties.description: number of leechers announced on tracker

DownloadPeer.name: DownloadPeer
DownloadPeer.description: Each torrent Download task has one or more DownloadPeer .

enum.description: trying to connect to the peer
connected to the peer, negotiating capabilities
got the peer from the tracker
got the peer from Peer exchange protocol
trying to connect to the peer
connected to the peer, negotiating capabilities

properties.name: global
properties.description: does this entry applies to all torrents

properties.name: download_dir
properties.description: the default path where downloads will be stored (base64 encoded)

properties.name: watch_dir
properties.description: special folder that will be monitored. When a new supported file (.nzb, .torrent) is copied in that folder, the task is automatically added to the download queue.

properties.name: use_watch_dir
properties.description: if set to false, the watch_dir will not be monitored

properties.name: dns1
properties.description: dns server ip to use for downloader (leave blank for default dns server)

properties.name: dns2
properties.description: dns server ip to use for downloader

properties.name: normal
properties.description: download rate for normal time slot (in B/s)

properties.name: slow
properties.description: download rate for normal slow slot (in B/s)

properties.name: schedule
properties.description: The schedule array represent the list of week hours timeslot, starting on monday a midnight. Therefore the complete week is represented in a array of 168 elements (24 * 7)

enum.description: downloads will use normal DlRate config for this timeslot
downloads will use slow DlRate config for this timeslot
downloads will be paused for this timeslot

properties.name: mode
properties.description: Throttling mode can have to following values

enum.description: force use of normal rate limits (not using the scheduler)
force use of slow rate limits (not using the scheduler)

properties.name: tx_rate
properties.description: maximum transmit rate (in byte/s) 0 means no limit

properties.name: rx_rate
properties.description: maximum receive rate (in byte/s) 0 means no limit

properties.name: ssl
properties.description: Use SSL to connect to server if set to true

properties.name: user
properties.description: NNTP auth username (can be empty if no auth is required)

properties.name: password
properties.description: NNTP auth password (can be empty if no auth is required)

properties.name: nthreads
properties.description: maximum concurrent connections to the NNTP server

properties.name: auto_repair
properties.description: automatically check and repair downloaded files using the provided par2 files

properties.name: lazy_par2
properties.description: if set to true the downloader will download the par2 files only if the download is corrupted

properties.name: auto_extract
properties.description: automatically attempt to extract downloaded files

properties.name: erase_tmp
properties.description: if auto_extract is enabled, delete archive files once successfully extracted

properties.name: max_peers
properties.description: maximum number of peers at a given time

properties.name: stop_ratio
properties.description: default stop_ratio for bt Download tasks

properties.name: crypto_support
properties.description: The crypto_support can have the following values

properties.name: announce_timeout
properties.description: timeout in seconds for announcing to tracker

properties.name: fetch_interval
properties.description: interval between automatic RSS refresh (in minutes)

properties.name: sources[]
properties.description: list of block list URL source

DownloadFeed.name: DownloadFeed
DownloadFeed.description: Download Feeds have the following attributes:

properties.name: status
properties.description: The feed can have the following status

enum.description: there was an error trying to refresh this feed, see error

properties.name: image_url
properties.description: Feed image URL (extracted from the RSS)

properties.name: nb_read
properties.description: Number of read items in the feed

properties.name: nb_unread
properties.description: Number of unread items in the feed

properties.name: auto_download
properties.description: If set to true, the downloader will automatically download new items

properties.name: fetch_ts
properties.description: Last time the feed was fetched

properties.name: pub_ts
properties.description: Last time the feed was published on remote server

properties.name: error
properties.description: Error code (same as used in Download or DownloadFile ).

DownloadFeedItem.name: DownloadFeedItem
DownloadFeedItem.description: Each RSS DownloadFeed contains feed items object

properties.name: link
properties.description: URL of the RSS feed attachment

properties.name: is_read
properties.description: you can mark the item as read manually, or it is marked as read automatically when the item is downloaded

properties.name: is_downloaded
properties.description: mark downloaded items, automatically set to true when RSS item is downloaded

properties.name: enclosure_url
properties.description: enclosure URL (if specified in RSS feed)

properties.name: enclosure_type
properties.description: enclosure mime type (if specified in RSS feed)

properties.name: enclosure_length
properties.description: enclosure size in bytes (if specified in RSS feed)

properties.name: members
properties.description: List of freeplugs member of this network

properties.name: local
properties.description: if true the Freeplug is connected directly to the Freebox

enum.description: The ethernet port state is unknown

properties.name: rx_rate
properties.description: rx rate (from the freeplugs to the “cco” freeplug) (in Mb/s) -1 if not available

properties.name: tx_rate
properties.description: tx rate (from the “cco” freeplug to the freeplugs) (in Mb/s) -1 if not available

FsTask.name: FsTask
FsTask.description: File system tasks have the following attributes:

enum.description: Queued (only one task is active at a given time)
The destination is not a directory
Source and Destination are the same file
This file type is not supported
Invalid or missing password for extraction
Failed to read the target of a symbolic link
Failed to create a symbolic link

properties.name: eta
properties.description: estimated time remaining before the task completion (in seconds)

properties.name: curr_bytes
properties.description: size of the file currently processed

properties.name: curr_bytes_done
properties.description: number of bytes processed for the current file

properties.name: path
properties.description: file path (encoded in base64 as explained in Path Encoding )

properties.name: target
properties.description: symlink target path (encoded in base64 as explained in Path Encoding ) (only present when link is set to true)

properties.name: hidden
properties.description: should the file be hidden to user

properties.name: weak_password
properties.description: is the ftp password weak (in this case remote access is disabled)

properties.name: port_ctrl
properties.description: ftp control port to use for remote access

properties.name: port_data
properties.description: ftp data port to use for remote access

properties.name: remote_domain
properties.description: domain name to use for remote access

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: is the UPnP IGD service enabled

properties.name: version
properties.description: UPnP IGD protocol version Supported values are 1 / 2

properties.name: int_ip
properties.description: the target IP on your LAN

properties.name: int_port
properties.description: the target port on your LAN

LanConfig.name: LanConfig
LanConfig.description: Lan config has the following attributes:

enum.description: The Freebox acts as a network router
The Freebox acts as a network bridge

LanHost.name: LanHost
LanHost.description: Lan Host has the following attributes:

properties.name: primary_name
properties.description: Host primary name (chosen from the list of available names, or manually set by user)

properties.name: host_type
properties.description: When possible, the Freebox will try to guess the host_type, but you can manually override this to the correct value

properties.name: primary_name_manual
properties.description: If true the primary name has been set manually

properties.name: l2ident
properties.description: Layer 2 network id and its type

properties.name: vendor_name
properties.description: Host vendor name (from the mac address)

properties.name: persistent
properties.description: If true the host is always shown even if it has not been active since the Freebox startup

properties.name: reachable
properties.description: If true the host can receive traffic from the Freebox

properties.name: last_time_reachable
properties.description: Last time the host was reached

properties.name: active
properties.description: If true the host sends traffic to the Freebox

properties.name: last_activity
properties.description: Last time the host sent traffic

properties.name: names
properties.description: List of available names, and their source

properties.name: l3connectivities
properties.description: List of available layer 3 network connections

LanHostName.name: LanHostName
LanHostName.description: Lan Host has the following attributes:

LanHostL2Ident.name: LanHostL2Ident
LanHostL2Ident.description: Lan Host has the following attributes:

LanHostL3Connectivity.name: LanHostL3Connectivity
LanHostL3Connectivity.description: Lan Host has the following attributes:

TokenRequest.name: TokenRequest
TokenRequest.description: Download objects have the following attributes

properties.name: app_name
properties.description: A descriptive application name (will be displayed on lcd)

properties.name: device_name
properties.description: The name of the device on which the app will be used

SessionStart.name: SessionStart
SessionStart.description: Download objects have the following attributes:

properties.name: app_id
properties.description: Same app_id used in TokenRequest to get the app_token

properties.name: password
properties.description: The password computed using the challenge and the app_token

DmzConfig.name: DmzConfig
DmzConfig.description: Dmz config has the following attributes:

PortForwardingConfig.name: PortForwardingConfig
PortForwardingConfig.description: Port forwarding config has the following attributes:

properties.name: lan_port
properties.description: forwarding target start port on LAN, (last port is lan_port + wan_port_end - wan_port_start)

properties.name: src_ip
properties.description: if src_ip == 0.0.0.0 this rule will apply to any src ip otherwise it will only apply to the specified ip address

IncomingPortConfig.name: IncomingPortConfig
IncomingPortConfig.description: Incoming port config has the following attributes:

enum.description: http port for remote access to Freebox OS
https port for tls remote access to Freebox OS
main bittorrent port for Freebox downloader
ftp control port for FTP remote access
ftp data port for FTP remote access

properties.name: active
properties.description: is the port binding currently active

properties.name: netns
properties.description: network namespace. The service may be running on a different namespace (for instance if the service uses the vpn client).

properties.name: min_port
properties.description: This field indicate the minimum possible value for in_port (see ConnectionStatus ipv4_port_range)

properties.name: max_port
properties.description: This field indicate the maximum possible value for in_port (see ConnectionStatus ipv4_port_range)

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: If set to true, the in_port field cannot be changed because of the underlying protocol does not allow it

properties.name: logon_enabled
properties.description: is login/password required to access shares

properties.name: guest_allow
properties.description: allow guest to access shared files

properties.name: server_type
properties.description: Afp server type (to display proper icon) in MacOS

ParentalFilterConfig.name: ParentalFilterConfig
ParentalFilterConfig.description: Parental filter configuration allow you to set the default filter_state to apply to hosts without rules on your network

ParentalFilterPlanning.name: ParentalFilterPlanning
ParentalFilterPlanning.description: Parental filter planning have the following attributes:

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: planning resolution : number of planning slots per day, e.g. 48 means that each slot represent 30 minutes

properties.name: cdayranges
properties.description: list of custom day range, each custom day range represents a group of days for which you want to use a different planning than other week days.

properties.name: mapping
properties.description: array of states for each corresponding planning slots. the array size is : (number of cdayranges + 7) * resolution

ParentalFilter.name: ParentalFilter
ParentalFilter.description: Parental filter rule objects have the following attributes:

properties.name: macs
properties.description: the list of mac addresses the rule should be applied to

properties.name: hosts
properties.description: the list of hostnames associated with macs

properties.name: ip
properties.description: only filled for old rules, you cannot set a rule with an IP

properties.name: forced
properties.description: is set to true, the rule will not use the planning and will always stay in the forced_mode

properties.name: forced_mode
properties.description: the filter policy to use when forced is set to true (see filter_state for valid states)

properties.name: tmp_mode_expire
properties.description: if != 0 the rule will not use the planning for the next tmp_mode_expire seconds

properties.name: tmp_mode
properties.description: the filter policy to use when tmp_mode_expire is != 0 (see filter_state for valid states)

enum.description: filter_state is temporary set to tmp_mode for the next tmp_mode_expire seconds
filter_state is set using the planning
access is granted only for HTTP and HTTPS traffic

properties.name: current_mapping_idx
properties.description: current index used in planning to compute filter_state (only relevant when scheduling_mode is planning)

properties.name: next_change
properties.description: seconds until next filter_state change 0 means filter_state won’t change

PvrConfig.name: PvrConfig
PvrConfig.description: PVR config has the following attributes:

properties.name: margin_before
properties.description: default margin before recording start time

properties.name: margin_after
properties.description: default margin after recording end time

PvrQuota.name: PvrQuota
PvrQuota.description: PVR Quota has the following attributes:

properties.name: media
properties.description: media name on which the record will be written to. See the Media API for more info. This property and can be empty when the file backing the record is not available, for example when secure is set.

properties.name: path
properties.description: destination directory on the media storage where the record will be written to

properties.name: has_record_gen
properties.description: if true, this precord has been generated using a Generator

properties.name: record_gen_id
properties.description: if has_record_gen, this is the id of the generator

properties.name: conflict
properties.description: if true this record may conflict with another record

properties.name: overlap_list
properties.description: in case of conflict, this will contain the list of records id that may conflict with this record

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: it only applies to generated records. If false the generated precord will be skipped.

properties.name: altered
properties.description: a precord is altered when some part of the recording may be missing. This can be the case if a conflict occurred during the recording (or connection was down)

properties.name: legacy_uri
properties.description: only used for legacy apps. Use channel_uuid instead when available NOTE: only visible when called from player

properties.name: force_channel_name
properties.description: only used for legacy apps. Use channel_uuid instead when available NOTE: only visible when called from player

properties.name: media
properties.description: media name on which the record is written. See the Media API for more info. This property and can be empty when the file backing the record is not available, for example when secure is set.

properties.name: path
properties.description: destination directory on the media storage

properties.name: byte_size
properties.description: size of the record file in bytes

properties.name: has_record_gen
properties.description: if true, this frecord has been generated using a Generator

properties.name: record_gen_id
properties.description: if has_record_gen, this is the id of the generator

properties.name: altered
properties.description: an frecord is altered when some part of the recording may be missing. This can be the case if a conflict occurred during the recording (or connection was down)

properties.name: secure
properties.description: flag set when the record is protected by DRM

properties.name: free_bytes
properties.description: number of free bytes on the medium

properties.name: total_bytes
properties.description: total number of bytes on the medium

properties.name: record_time
properties.description: estimated record time in seconds for multiple channel types and qualities

RRDFetch.name: RRDFetch
RRDFetch.description: This is the object used to get stats

properties.name: db
properties.description: Name of the rrd database to read. It can take one of the following values

properties.name: date_start
properties.description: The requested start timestamp of the stats to get

properties.name: date_end
properties.description: The requested end timestamp of the stats to get

properties.name: precision
properties.description: By default all values are cast to int, if you need floating point precision you can provide a precision factor that will be applied to all values before being returned.

properties.name: fields
properties.description: If you are only interested in getting some fields you can provide the list of fields you want to get.

ShareLink.name: ShareLink
ShareLink.description: Share link have the following attributes:

properties.name: path
properties.description: The root path of the share, if the path is a regular file, only this file will be shared

properties.name: name
properties.description: The readable name of the shared file/folder

properties.name: expire
properties.description: Link expiration timestamp, 0 means no expiration.

properties.name: fullurl
properties.description: Full URL to use for remote access. If remote access is disabled, the field will be empty.

OperationProgress.name: OperationProgress
OperationProgress.description: Operation progress has the following attributes:

DiskPartition.name: DiskPartition
DiskPartition.description: Disk partitions have the following attributes:

properties.name: path
properties.description: partition mount point (encoded in base64 as explained in fs API)

enum.description: Partition has not been checked yet

StorageDisk.name: StorageDisk
StorageDisk.description: Storage disks have the following attributes:

properties.name: time_before_spindown
properties.description: seconds left before disk spin down (in seconds) (when available)

properties.name: external_pm_idle_before_spindown
properties.description: idle time in minutes to wait before spinning down an external disk

properties.name: mode
properties.description: display form of speed and duplex mode

properties.name: mac_list
properties.description: list of { mac, name } of hosts connected to this port

enum.description: The disk as not been detected

properties.name: box_flavor
properties.description: the box ‘flavor’ for a given model

enum.description: The box has an internal storage
The box has no internal storage

properties.name: user_main_storage
properties.description: The label of the storage partition to use for user data. (Matches the label of the DiskPartition ) In case of ‘light’ box flavor, it must be set by to a permanently attached external storage

FileUpload.name: FileUpload
FileUpload.description: File uploads have the following attributes:

properties.name: status
properties.description: upload status can have the following values

enum.description: Upload authorization is valid, upload has not started yet
Upload authorization is no longer valid

properties.name: last_update
properties.description: last update of file upload object

properties.name: force
properties.description: select the way conflicts are handled

enum.description: The response to the FileUploadStartAction will be an error with ‘destination_conflict’ if the destination file already exists. The response will also contain a file_size attribute containing the existing file length (useful for resuming upload)
If the target file already exists it will be overridden
The upload will resume, all sent chunks will then be appended to the existing file.

FileUploadChunkResponse.name: FileUploadChunkResponse
FileUploadChunkResponse.description: For each received chunk, the Freebox will send a chunk response containing upload progress information the request_id used in response will be the one from the FileUploadStartAction , and ‘action’ value will be ‘upload_data’

properties.name: complete
properties.description: will be true in a reply to FileUploadFinalizeAction or FileUploadCancelAction

properties.name: cancelled
properties.description: will be true in a reply FileUploadCancelAction

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: is the UPnP AV service enabled

properties.name: auth_connection_count
properties.description: number of active connections that have passed authentication

properties.name: allowed_auth
properties.description: allowed authentication methods dictionnary with following entries:

properties.name: id_custom
properties.description: value of the source id when id_source is custom

properties.name: auth_modes
properties.description: map of supported auth modes, currently only psk is supported

properties.name: min_port
properties.description: This field indicate the minimum possible value for port (see ConnectionStatus ipv4_port_range)

properties.name: max_port
properties.description: This field indicate the maximum possible value for port (see ConnectionStatus ipv4_port_range)

properties.name: conf_pptp
properties.description: only available when type is PPTP

properties.name: conf_openvpn
properties.description: only available when type is OpenVPN

properties.name: conf_ipsec
properties.description: only available when type is IPsec

properties.name: ip_start
properties.description: start of the IP range that will be used to give clients an IP

properties.name: ip_end
properties.description: end of the IP range that will be used to give clients an IP

properties.name: ip6_start
properties.description: start of the IPv6 range that will be used to give clients an IPv6

properties.name: ip6_end
properties.description: end of the IPv6 range that will be used to give clients an IPv6

properties.name: password
properties.description: VPN user password (length must be between 8 and 32)

properties.name: password_set
properties.description: True if a password was provided for this user

properties.name: ip_reservation
properties.description: You can specify the IP you want to assign to this user. If you don’t want to use a specific IP pass an empty string or omit this property.

properties.name: local_ip
properties.description: attributed IP address from VPN adress pool

properties.name: active
properties.description: is this configuration active. Only one configuration is active at a time.

properties.name: conf_pptp
properties.description: only available when type is PPTP

properties.name: allowed_auth
properties.description: allowed authentication methods dictionnary with following keys:

properties.name: next_try
properties.description: seconds left until next connection attempt

enum.description: mac filter is enabled, using a whitelist
mac filter is enabled, using a blacklist

WifiAp.name: WifiAp
WifiAp.description: The Freebox may have one or more access points, you can configure each access point with this api.

WifiApStatus.name: WifiApStatus
WifiApStatus.description: The Freebox may have one or more access points, you can configure each access point with this api.

enum.description: Ap is currently disabled according to planning
Ap is selecting the best available channel
Ap is scanning for other access point
Ap is performing dynamic frequency selection

properties.name: channel_width
properties.description: effective channel width (in MHz) primary_channel int Read-only ¶ effective primary channel secondary_channel int Read-only ¶ effective secondary channel dfs_cac_remaining_time int Read-only ¶ time left in dfs state

WifiApCapabilities.name: WifiApCapabilities
WifiApCapabilities.description: The Freebox may have one or more access points, you can configure each access point with this api.

properties.name: 2d4g
properties.description: map of capabilites in 2.4 GHz band

properties.name: 5g
properties.description: map of capabilites in 5 GHz band

properties.name: 60g
properties.description: map of capabilites in 60 GHz band

WifiApHtConfig.name: WifiApHtConfig
WifiApHtConfig.description: NOTE: before enabling some feature in ap config, you should ensure that AP supports the feature using its provided capabilities.

WifiApConfig.name: WifiApConfig
WifiApConfig.description: NOTE: before enabling some feature in ap config, you should ensure that AP supports the feature using its provided capabilities.

properties.name: primary_channel
properties.description: wanted primary channel, value of 0 means automatic selection

properties.name: secondary_channel
properties.description: wanted secondary channel, value of 0 means automatic selection

WifiAllowedComb.name: WifiAllowedComb
WifiAllowedComb.description: To be able to allow user to pick a valid channel combination for a given AP you should use the following api to retreive the list of allowed channel combination.

properties.name: band
properties.description: the band for which the combination can be used

properties.name: channel_width
properties.description: the channel_width for which the combination can be used

properties.name: dfs_cac_time
properties.description: time required in dfs state before behing able to start the AP.

properties.name: secondary
properties.description: secondary channel (zero means that secondary channel will not be used)

properties.name: bssid
properties.description: bssid on which the client is associated

properties.name: bitrate
properties.description: physical link rate (in 1/10th of MBit/s), -1 if unknown

properties.name: mcs
properties.description: current link mcs, -1 if not used

properties.name: vht_mcs
properties.description: current link vht mcs, -1 if not used

properties.name: sta_count
properties.description: number of stations for this bss authorized_sta_count int Read-only ¶ number of authenticated stations for this bss is_main_bss bool Read-only ¶ if bss is main bs, its configuration will be reused for other bss with attribute use_default_config set as true. This can be used to apply the same configuration to 2 bss on 2 AP operating on different wifi bands.

properties.name: authorized_sta_count
properties.description: number of authenticated stations for this bss

properties.name: is_main_bss
properties.description: if bss is main bs, its configuration will be reused for other bss with attribute use_default_config set as true. This can be used to apply the same configuration to 2 bss on 2 AP operating on different wifi bands.

properties.name: enabled
properties.description: enable this BSS. Note that if you want the AP to completely stop emitting wifi you should use WifiGlobalConfig enabled attribute, otherwise FreeWifi and FreeWifi Secure may still be active.

properties.name: hide_ssid
properties.description: don’t show bss in bss list

properties.name: band
properties.description: the band for which the combination can be used

properties.name: noise_level
properties.description: noise level on channel in dB

properties.name: resolution
properties.description: planning resolution (number of slots per day)

properties.name: mapping
properties.description: mapping for planning : “on” or “off” mapping[0] is monday at 0:0 mapping[7 * resolution - 1] is sunday last slot

enum.description: if mac_filter is set to whitelist this station will be allowed
if mac_filter is set to blacklist this station will be rejected
